acceptance_targets: [chapter_04-F003] Pass if `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:17` through `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:39` contain at least two explicit Leela-internal beats (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment) before the memory paragraph at line 41.

[chapter_04-F004] Pass if no revised back-half stretch after `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:225` contains more than one bare notification paragraph in a row without fresh dramatic action, and at least one June contact beat in that span is rendered through a materially different form than a standalone timestamped text or unanswered buzz.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:17` through `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:39` contain at least two explicit Leela-internal beats (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment) before the memory paragraph at line 41.
findings.evidence: `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:17` starts June's entrance and confrontation; focalized interiority does not return until `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:41`, after roughly a dozen short blocking/dialogue paragraphs.
findings.problem: The opening conflict scene briefly drops the close-third contract and reads like screenplay blocking. The chapter is strongest when Leela's guilt and bodily stress are in the room; delaying interiority this long makes the first June confrontation flatter than the rest of the chapter.
findings.rewrite_direction: Seed brief Leela-internal beats into `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:17`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:23`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:31`, or `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:37` instead of waiting until `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:41` for memory and self-implication.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if no revised back-half stretch after `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:225` contains more than one bare notification paragraph in a row without fresh dramatic action, and at least one June contact beat in that span is rendered through a materially different form than a standalone timestamped text or unanswered buzz.
findings.evidence: `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:99`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:225`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:453` reuse the bare "Her phone buzzed" interruption; `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:227`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:231`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:235`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:331`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:343`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:345`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:347`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:417`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:441` keep returning to the same isolated timestamp/message-log construction.
findings.problem: The back half leans too hard on the same notification-log scaffold. After the first few interruptions the repeated buzz/timestamp/text format becomes predictable prose machinery, which flattens pressure that should keep intensifying.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary or compress the interruption beats at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:225`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:227`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:231`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:235`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:329`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:341`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:415`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:439` so not every escalation arrives as another log entry. Fold some into live action, partial voicemail content, or a materially different interruption texture.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the absurdity and cruelty of graduate labor without converting the book into caricature or chase-plot menace. In edge cases, prefer the messier and more compromising version of events if it yields stronger human consequence and remains causally plausible; render sex, professional theft, bureaucratic harm, and emotional pettiness with the same specificity as any technical problem.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns vague at the exact point humiliation, erotic charge, class shame, visa fear, or institutional cruelty becomes concrete, rewrite until the cost is materially and socially legible.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High; contractions are the baseline in speech, and uncontracted forms should appear only for deliberate precision, class performance, emotional emphasis, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate public and private pressure, ensemble chapters and solitary ones, bureaucratic scenes and domestic scenes, deadline compression and aftermath inventory, so no two adjacent chapters rely on the same structural rhythm or dialogue density.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary literary English grounded in material detail; technical language should appear only when the social reality of the lab requires it, and it should never replace bodily or relational consequence.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person centered on Leela, with occasional brief widenings that register group mood and institutional atmosphere without leaving her interpretive frame.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate compressed observational lines with longer accrual sentences that can carry comedy, shame, and procedural dread in the same movement; quiet chapters should breathe, deadline chapters should tighten without turning telegraphic.
